title: CI Matrices, Required Checks, Caching, and Merge Policy
description: Build a secure required-check workflow across supported environments. Learners cumulatively produce a required CI quality-gate workflow through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate trusted branch workflows from untrusted pull-request code and secrets.
Order cheap discriminating checks before expensive matrices while preserving useful parallelism.
Test declared runtime, operating-system, database, and feature support intentionally.
